scripts.test:unit: hardhat test test/unit/AvalancheLSTStrategy.test.js test/unit/AvalancheOracleManager.test.js test/unit/AvalancheOracleManager.Basic.test.js test/unit/AvalancheOracleManager.Prices.test.js test/unit/AvalancheOracleManager.Integration.test.js test/unit/DeltaNeutralRebalancer.test.js test/unit/FinancialFailureScenarios.test.js test/unit/GMXFuturesManager.test.js test/unit/MockSAVAX.test.js test/unit/SAVAXRewardsDistribution.test.js test/ForceVault.test.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run node" "sleep 5 && npm run create-placeholder && sleep 20 && npm run deploy-local" "sleep 30 && npm run frontend"
scripts.create-placeholder: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='./deployments-static.json'; const dest='./frontend/src/deployments.json'; fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); console.log('Copied', src, 'to', dest);"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run install-frontend && npm run compile && npm run create-placeholder
